headline: McKesson Taps AI Personalization To Support Loyalty And Long Term Growth
summary: McKesson (NYSE:MCK) is adopting Exchange Solutions' loyalty and personalization platform as it updates its customer engagement approach. The move is designed to use AI driven decisioning and real time personalization while keeping McKesson's core systems intact. This modernization is aimed at supporting enterprise clients with faster program changes and more tailored interactions. For investors watching NYSE:MCK at a share price of $860.16, this technology shift sits alongside a long...
